---
title: "Cicely Gertrude Bowles"
---

## Cicely Gertrude Bowles

**Dates:** (1890-1974)

### Description

great-niece of CMY

### Biography

Eldest child of Henry and Alethea Bowles, she married (1915) Harry Francis Saunders. She was christened in February 1890.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 2d [1900]
- Letter from March 2 [1900]
- Letter from Feb 1st [1900]
- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- Letter from [1899-1900?]
- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]
- Letter from July 1st [1897]
- Letter from May 3d [1897]
- Letter from Aug 11th [1891]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
